message:
feat: implement robust accept loop error recovery in proxy daemon (rust_proxy-j41)

Add robust error handling to prevent daemon crashes from transient OS errors:

- Add is_transient_accept_error() to detect recoverable errors (EMFILE, ENFILE,
  ECONNABORTED, ENOBUFS, ENOMEM, ConnectionReset, Interrupted, WouldBlock)
- Add AcceptBackoff struct for exponential backoff (10ms to 5000ms cap)
- Update accept loop to log transient errors and retry vs fatal errors that exit
- Add 6 comprehensive unit tests for error classification and backoff behavior

This prevents the daemon from crashing during temporary resource exhaustion,
network hiccups, or client connection resets during the accept window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
